About This Item

About the Collection

Welcome to The Vault — a personal collection dedicated to Washington Capitals memorabilia spanning decades of hockey history. Every piece in this collection has been carefully sourced, authenticated, and preserved.

From game-worn jerseys to signed pucks, from rare trading cards to game-used sticks, this collection represents a lifelong passion for the Washington Capitals and the sport of hockey.

Each item comes with its own story — where it was worn, who used it, and what moment in Capitals history it represents. The collection is a living archive of the franchise's greatest moments and players.

Jerseys & Equipment I Would Like to Add

A running list of pieces I'd love to track down. If you have one of these — or anything else from the Capitals you'd like to discuss — reach out.

— Carlson 2014 alternate jersey — Backstrom 2018 home jersey with Cup patch — Ovechkin game-used gloves — Holtby blocker — Add your wants here…
